using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.Linq;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace BenchmarkRunner
{
    public sealed class BenchmarkContext
    {
        public required string Repository { get; init; }
        public required string Model { get; init; }
        public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
        public double Score(double[] values) => values.Where(double.IsFinite).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Average();
    }

    public sealed class BenchmarkResult
    {
        public string Model { get; init; } = "";
        public string Repository { get; init; } = "";
        public IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; } = [];
        public double Mean { get; init; } = 0;
        public double StdDev { get; init; } = 0;
        public int RunCount { get; init; } = 0;
        public TimeSpan TotalTime { get; init; } = TimeSpan.Zero;
        public IReadOnlyList<BenchmarkRun> Runs { get; init; } = [];
    }

    public sealed class BenchmarkRun
    {
        public double Value { get; init; } = 0;
        public TimeSpan Elapsed { get; init; } = TimeSpan.Zero;
        public string? Error { get; init; }
    }

    public sealed class ResumableBenchmarkRunner
    {
        private readonly List<BenchmarkContext> _contexts = [];
        private readonly int _maxConcurrent;
        private readonly SemaphoreSlim _semaphore;
        private readonly CancellationTokenSource _cts;
